title: Beurre Noisette Crusted British Filet Mignon
description: A rich and decadent British filet mignon dish, featuring a beurre noisette crust. This dish is perfect for a special occasion or dinner party.
instructions: Season the filet mignon with salt and pepper.
In a pan, melt 1 tablespoon of beurre noisette over medium heat.
Add the flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the grated cheese and cook until melted and smooth.
Add the thyme and stir to combine.
Dredge the filet mignon in the beurre noisette crust, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat a skillet over high heat and add the remaining 3 tablespoons of beurre noisette.
Sear the filet mignon for 1-2 minutes per side, then transfer to a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
